gaps: No explicit AI risk management or impact assessment process defined

Absence of continuous performance monitoring, bias detection, or model drift controls

recommendations: Implement formal AI risk assessment and impact analysis per ISO/IEC 42001 clauses 6.1 and 8.2
Add decision logging, audit trails, and human-in-the-loop oversight for all escalations

Document and integrate compliance flags into a traceable AI governance policy with regular reviews
